hero.title: Modern way to invest in gold
hero.subtitle: Buy gold easily and securely through our app and smart kiosks

features.title: Buy, Sell, Store Gold
features.description: We offer you 24/7 gold buying, selling, storing, and trading opportunities that meet international and Mongolian standards (ISO 22001). With fast transactions, quick liquidity, guaranteed prices, and secure operations, you can build your future with gold anywhere, anytime.

features2.title: Your Future Guarantee
features2.description: Gold ATM and storage services are a solution that securely and reliably stores and grows your gold and assets.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.question1: What is the "FGN: Fine Gold Nation" app?
faq.answer1: The "FGN: Fine Gold Nation" app is a digital platform where users can purchase gold products, view their gold holdings, store gold, transfer it to others, and receive gold price updates. Gold products purchased through the app are verified through a registry linked to actual 999.9 purity gold.
faq.question2: What is a Fine Gold Nation "Gold Product"?
faq.answer2: A "Gold Product" refers to a 999.9 purity gold item bearing Fine Gold Nation's name, logo, weight, purity, serial number, and related certification information.
faq.question3: What services does Fine Gold Nation offer?
faq.answer3: Fine Gold Nation provides the following services: purchasing 999.9 purity gold products; viewing your gold holdings, valuation, and transaction history through the app; storing your gold; transferring gold between registered users; and collecting physical products through KIOSK machines or official company channels.
faq.question4: How is the gold price determined?
faq.answer4: Fine Gold Nation calculates the gold price by aligning the Bank of Mongolia's daily precious metal rate with international gold price movements, market conditions, and product-related costs. Users can view the current gold price, price changes, and the valuation of their holdings directly through the app.
faq.question5: If the gold price rises after I buy through the app, do I profit?
faq.answer5: If the market price of gold you purchased rises, the monetary value of your holdings may increase. However, gold prices can fall as well as rise based on market conditions. Fine Gold Nation does not guarantee price appreciation, profit, or returns. Users make purchasing decisions at their own risk and responsibility.
faq.question6: Can I order heavier or custom gold products?
faq.answer6: Yes. Users may submit a request to order gold products in larger weights or with special designs and sizes. The weight, design, price, production timeline, advance payment, and other terms for custom orders are agreed upon with the company at the time of request.
faq.question7: Where is my purchased gold stored?
faq.answer7: Gold purchased through the app is registered and stored in accordance with Fine Gold Nation's certified reserve, storage registry, and internal procedures. Users can view their gold holdings in grams and as a monetary value based on the current exchange rate within the relevant section of the app.
faq.question8: What sizes of gold can I purchase through the app?
faq.answer8: Users can purchase gold within the minimum amount and conditions offered at the time. Purchased gold is recorded in grams in the user's account. Physical gold products are available in sizes of 1g, 2.5g, 5g, 10g, 20g, 1 troy oz (31.1g), 50g, 100g, and 1000g. Available sizes and product types depend on current stock and service conditions.
faq.question9: Can I take physical possession of gold purchased through the app?
faq.answer9: Yes. Users can request to receive a selected amount of their gold holdings as a physical product through KIOSK machines or official company branches and service points. Once confirmed, the requested gold is temporarily locked and the physical delivery process begins. Available locations, timing, and conditions are communicated through the app and official company channels.
faq.answer10: Fine Gold Nation implements appropriate security measures, storage controls, and insurance arrangements to reduce risks related to the storage and protection of users' gold. The terms, coverage, and procedures of the insurance are governed by the company's terms of service and related agreements and regulations.
faq.question11: Why does the monetary value of my gold in the app keep changing?
faq.answer11: The gram quantity of your gold holdings may not change. However, as the market price of gold fluctuates, the monetary value of your holdings may increase or decrease accordingly. The monetary amount displayed in the app therefore changes in line with the current exchange rate.
faq.question12: Can I transfer gold to another person?
faq.answer12: Yes. When the transfer service in the app is active, users can transfer gold from their holdings to other registered users. Before making a transfer, carefully verify the recipient's information, the amount of gold being transferred, and all other details. The user is solely responsible for any risks or consequences arising from incorrect information or selecting the wrong recipient.
faq.question13: What should I do if I made an incorrect or mistaken transaction?
faq.answer13: If you sent a transaction or transfer to the wrong recipient, or entered incorrect information, contact Fine Gold Nation's Customer Service immediately. The company will investigate based on transaction records, the user's explanation, and supporting documentation. However, the company may not be able to unilaterally reverse, cancel, or modify a transaction that was confirmed due to user error, so always double-check all information before proceeding.
faq.question14: What should I do if my purchase fails?
faq.answer14: If your payment was deducted but the purchased gold does not appear in your "My Holdings" section, prepare your transaction receipt, date, payment amount, and registered phone number, then contact FGN Customer Service. FGN will review the relevant transaction information and take the necessary steps.
faq.question15: What should I do if I forget my password?
faq.answer15: If you forget your password, you can recover it through the "Forgot Password" section of the app using your registered phone number or email address. Never share the verification code or link sent during password recovery with any third party.
faq.question16: What should I do if I lose my phone?
faq.answer16: If your phone is lost, stolen, or at risk of being accessed by a third party, contact FGN Customer Service immediately to request a temporary lock on your account. Also review the security of your banking app, email, phone number, and other linked accounts, and notify relevant service providers if necessary.
